productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men 3 Series Light Black Sports Shoes
description: Make those winning baskets in style with the adidas 3 Series Basketball shoe. Constructed for ultra-quick performance and with absolute lightweight comfort, these shoes are poised to set you soaring. Upper Synthetic leather upper for maximum durability and lightweight comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the medial side in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand& rsquo s belief in performance High ankle for snug support to the lower leg Synthetic overlay at the back heel for enhanced backfoot protection and support Perforations on the forefoot, heel and midfoot for ventilation Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Midsole PU midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded footbed for all day cushioned comfort Outsole Durable non-marking rubber outsole with waffle patterned lugs and suction points on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Horizontal grooves on the medial forefoot and lateral heel for enhanced ease of moveMent and stability Torsion system in the midfoot to support the inner arch and improve forefoot motion control in both linear and lateral moveMent Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
